info.title: Taaruf API v2
info.description: REST API documentation for Taaruf mobile app (v2). Base URL prefix: `/api/v2`. Authenticated routes require Laravel Sanctum bearer token.

servers.description: Current host (same as this Swagger page — use for local testing)

post.description: Same as POST /register/complete — full registration after OTP verification.

422.description: Validation error (invalid JSON body or missing fields)

post.summary: Check if phone exists and age eligibility

post.description:
Update bio, birthday, location (text), name, gender, country, interests, or profile photo. All fields are optional.

**Validation rules**
| Field | Rule |
|-------|------|
| date_of_birth | Valid date; user must be **at least 18** years old |
| bio / about_me | Max **2000** characters |
| location | Free text, max **255** characters |
| profile_image | Multipart only: JPG, JPEG, PNG, WEBP; max **2 MB (2048 KB)** |

Optional header `X-App-Language: en` or `ar` (or `?lang=ar`) for localized validation messages.

profile_image.description: Profile photo. Max 2 MB (2048 KB). Allowed: JPG, JPEG, PNG, WEBP.

422.description: Validation error (e.g. under 18, image too large, invalid image type)

date_of_birth: You must be at least 18 years old to use this service.

profile_image: Profile image is too large. Maximum allowed size is 2 MB (2048 KB).
Profile image must be JPG, JPEG, PNG, or WEBP.

post.summary: Send OTP to change phone number
Send test push to current user

get.summary: Search users (public; enhanced filters in v2)
Get last saved user search filters (v2, auth)

200.description: Saved search and clicked user IDs

post.summary: Record search result profile click (v2, auth)

delete.summary: Remove user from recent search clicks (v2, auth)

ProfileUpdateJsonRequest.description: All fields optional. Send only fields you want to update.

date_of_birth.description: Must be at least 18 years ago (YYYY-MM-DD).

sanctum.description: Login or register to obtain a token. Use: Authorization: Bearer {token}
